steps.title: Spot the comparison cue
steps.content: The passage sets up a blank after describing the tribes’ activity as a single industry, indicating we need to compare its contribution to other industries using the table.

steps.title: Match the contribution to the data
steps.content: The table shows the tribal industry’s contribution exceeds that of arts/entertainment/recreation but is less than that of professional services, which fits choice D exactly. The other three choices either claim equality, being lower than both, or exceeding both, which the table does not support. That matches choice D — D is correct.
